channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: La WWDC 2026 d’Apple devrait être unique en son genre, voici pourquoi
item.description: La keynote de la WWDC 2026 devrait symboliser la passation de pouvoir entre Tim Cook et John Ternus.

item.title: Dune is the new worldwide music platform aiming to fix Spotify's artist income problem — and the band you love? Probably loves it
item.description: This new music platform is like Spotify and Kickstarter rolled into one — and one of my all-time favorite bands is launching music exclusively on it.

item.title: Apple : Donald Trump rend hommage à Tim Cook… et finit par l’insulter
item.description: Pour rendre hommage à Tim Cook, le président américain Donald Trump s'est fendu d'un message sur son réseau social. Ça partait d'une bonne intention, jusqu'à ce qu'il l'insulte.

item.title: Pénurie de kérosène en vue ? Le prix des billets d’avion risque d’exploser pour les vacances d’été
item.description: Le patron de l'Agence internationale de l'énergie parle de « plus grande crise énergétique jamais connue ». L'Europe dispose de six semaines de stock de kérosène, et le cessez-le-feu avec l'Iran vacille.

item.title: The 'immersive' DJI Avata 2 just hit a new record-low price — this is your cue to get into FPV drones
item.description: The DJI Avata 2 is the easy way to start your FPV drone journey - particularly with this record-low deal at Amazon.

item.title: IKEA’s range of affordable smart home devices just got a handy upgrade — and it’s a big win for Samsung phone and TV users
item.description: Samsung just made it easier for you to integrate your IKEA smart home devices with SmartThings.

item.title: Game Pass en avril 2026 : Aphelion, Kiln, Final Fantasy… voici la deuxième vague de jeux du mois
item.description: Microsoft vient de dévoiler la deuxième vague du Game Pass du mois d'avril avec la sortie attendue d'Aphelion, le nouveau jeu de Don't Nod.

item.title: The extinction or the adaptation: how AI will impact SaaS market
item.description: SaaS used to rely on enterprise subscriptions. Now, AI threatens this business model.

item.title: How to watch Half Man online for free: Stream Richard Gadd's Baby Reindeer follow-up from anywhere, release date
item.description: Richard Gadd's much-anticipated gritty follow-up to Baby Reindeer has arrived – here's how to watch Half Man online from anywhere, including FREE streams.

item.title: OLED, 120 Hz, Ultra 7, 32 Go RAM : ce laptop Lenovo très bien équipé est aussi 47 % moins cher (mais pas pour tout le monde)
item.description: Fin, léger et doté d'une configuration plus que solide, le Lenovo Yoga Slim 7 est actuellement disponible à un très bon prix. La Fnac l'affiche en effet à 999,99 euros au lieu de 1 899,99 euros, mais seulement pour ses adhérents.

item.title: Amazon taps Sweden’s Einride for its electric big rigs
item.description: The agreement comes just as Einride is finalizing a merger with blank-check company Legato Merger Corp. to go public.

item.title: North Korea's Lazarus makes off with $290M crypto in Kelp DAO heist after siphoning funds using fraudulent transactions
item.description: Lazarus Group tricked the system by taking control of some of the servers used to verify transactions

item.title: Splatoon Raiders lands on Nintendo Switch 2 on July 23
item.description: Nintendo has padded out the Switch 2 release slate for this summer by revealing that Splatoon Raiders is coming to the console on July 23. This is the first spinoff in the series and while it's a "single-player-focused Splatoon game," there is a multiplayer element. Nintendo announced Splatoon Raiders (the title of which is a soft pun on Tomb Raider) last June.You play as a mechanic and after customizing your character's appearance, you'll go hunting for treasure across the Spirhalite Islands. You'll be working with Deep Cut — a fictional band that appeared in Splatoon 3 — and upgrading your w...

item.title: Un robot humanoïde livré chez vous ? L’AGIBOT X2 arrive en France, et il ne coûte « que » 17 889 euros
item.description: Joybuy, la plateforme de e-commerce du groupe chinois JD.com, propose l'AGIBOT X2 en précommande en France à 17 889 euros. Un robot humanoïde vendu comme un produit ordinaire : un signal fort pour le marché.

item.title: Trump’s Fed nominee, a wealthy investor, will face tough Senate questions about transparency
item.description: Democrats are expected to grill Kevin Warsh on his financial holdings, which amount to over $100 million. Kevin Warsh is taking another step toward his decade-long goal of winning the top job at the Federal Reserve by appearing at a hearing before the Senate Banking Committee on Tuesday. But the role that he may eventually assume could turn out vastly different than what he expected.Inflation is worsening as the Iran war has spiked gas prices, making it much harder for the Fed to implement the interest rate cuts President Donald Trump so desperately seeks. The conflict could also slow the econ...

item.title: I tried Panasonic’s tiny f/2 lens — and it’s just what its full-frame Lumix cameras needed, except for one thing
item.description: Panasonic's Lumix S 40mm F2 squeezes impressive optics and versatile f/2 aperture into a tiny, well-designed body.

item.title: Compact, lumineux et accessible : le Lumix S 40mm F2 bouscule la gamme Panasonic
item.description: Panasonic a présenté ce mardi un nouvel objectif à focale fixe particulièrement séduisant, le Lumix S 40mm F2.

item.title: Huawei Watch Buds 2 et Ultimate Star Diamond Edition : la marque chinoise dévoile deux montres atypiques
item.description: Huawei annonce deux nouvelles montres connectées pour des publics radicalement différents. D'un côté une 2-en-1 qui cache des écouteurs, de l'autre une version (très) luxueuse de la Watch Ultimate 2.

item.title: Valve's Steam Controller launch looks imminent as hidden 'unboxing' video is spotted
item.description: Valve has remained tight-lipped on both the Steam Machine and Steam Controller, but a new discovery suggests we might see the latter launch soon.

item.title: Nintendo Switch 2 : les 5 réglages indispensables avant de jouer
item.description: Si vous venez de vous procurer une Nintendo Switch 2, on vous explique les 5 premiers réglages à configurer avant de vous lancer en pleine partie.

item.title: Apple Watch, iPhone X, AirPods… les 5 produits tech’ qui ont le plus marqué l’ère Tim Cook
item.description: L'Apple Watch en 2015, les écouteurs AirPods en 2016, l'iPhone X en 2017, les puces Apple Silicon en 2020 et enfin toute l'offre « Services » des dernières années : l'ère Tim Cook a été marquée par de nombreux produits Apple à succès. Florilège.

item.title: Revolut eyes valuation of up to $200B in eventual IPO
item.description: Fintech giant Revolut, which secured a full banking license in the U.K. in March after years of waiting, was most recently valued at $75 billion in a secondary share sale.

item.title: The Vergecast Vergecast, 2026 edition
item.description: We get a lot of questions about how The Verge works. And how The Vergecast works. And how we make money. And whether some of that money helps Nilay buy more jackets, several yachts, or something else entirely. So, every once in a while, we spend an episode of the podcast answering as many questions […]

item.title: John Ternus’s first big problem is AI
item.description: Less than a year ago, Apple made headlines for a lack of AI announcements at its annual WWDC event. Ten months later, the company has announced that hardware executive John Ternus will succeed longtime CEO Tim Cook as chief executive - and the official release doesn't mention AI once. Ternus, currently Apple's SVP of hardware […]

item.title: The 10 Best Electrolyte Powders (We Tested Nearly 20)
item.description: Get those lost minerals back with the help of our top electrolyte powders, tablets, drops, and chews for athletes, partiers, and everyone in between.

item.title: « À minuit, les étoiles tombèrent comme la pluie » : les Lyrides atteignent leur pic cette nuit, voici comment les voir
item.description: Ce mois d'avril est idéal pour admirer les Lyrides, une pluie d'étoiles filantes bien connue des astronomes depuis plus de 2500 ans. Le pic aura lieu ce soir, dans la nuit du 21 au 22 avril, une occasion à ne pas manquer.

item.title: Le Xiaomi Redmi Note 15 Pro+ 5G est à -30 %, un cador du milieu de gamme déjà à prix cassé
item.description: Le Xiaomi Redmi Note 15 Pro+ 5G est le modèle le plus costaud de la série que le constructeur a récemment lancée. Et si ce dernier vous fait de l'œil, le voilà en promotion à 335 euros au lieu de 499 euros au départ.

item.title: J’ai testé la Denza Z9GT, la voiture électrique de BYD qui se recharge en 5 minutes et qui arrive en France
item.description: La marque premium de BYD, Denza, arrive en Europe avec la Z9GT en porte-étendard. Cette immense voiture électrique met en avant son avant-garde technologique, incluant trois moteurs et sa fameuse recharge en 5 minutes. Suffisant pour inquiéter les ténors allemands ? Voici notre premier essai.

item.title: Who is John Ternus really? 5 surprising facts that show Apple's next CEO isn't Tim Cook 2.0
item.description: 'Johnny Appleseed' will soon take over from 'Tim Apple' (ahem), and here are some interesting — and some rather odd — facts about him.

item.title: Splatoon Raiders hits the Switch 2 in July
item.description: The squid kids will be back this summer. Nintendo announced this morning that Splatoon Raiders, a single-player spinoff of its competitive shooter series, will launch on the Nintendo Switch 2 on July 23rd. It'll be the first new entry in the series since Splatoon 3 in 2022. In addition to the date, Nintendo also released […]

item.title: Purdue Pharma’s sentencing in opioids case is imminent, clearing the way for settlement money to flow
item.description: The settlement, approved last year, could go into effect on May 1. A judge is expected to sentence OxyContin maker Purdue Pharma to forfeit $225 million to the Justice Department on Tuesday, clearing the way for the company to finalize a settlement of thousands of lawsuits it faces over its role in the opioid crisis.The penalty was agreed to in a 2020 pact to resolve federal civil and criminal probes it was facing. If the judge signs off, other penalties will not be collected in return for Purdue settling the other lawsuits.After years of legal twists and turns, the settlement was approved by...

item.title: Geely Galaxy M9 : pourquoi ce nouveau SUV familial à moins de 22 000 € en Chine fait déjà trembler Li Auto et Nio
item.description: Geely a lancé en septembre 2025 le Galaxy M9, un SUV électrique à prolongateur d'autonomie de plus de 5,20 mètres. Ce véhicule familial propose une configuration jusqu'à sept places et j'ai pu l'observer en concession en Chine.

item.title: Find X9 Ultra : Oppo sort l’artillerie lourde avec deux capteurs 200 Mpx et un zoom x10
item.description: Oppo dévoile le Find X9 Ultra. Doté d’une batterie de 7050 mAh et de plusieurs téléobjectif dont un x10 il mise aussi sur un kit photo externe pour offrir une expérience qui se rapproche le plus d’un appareil professionnel.

item.title: Chipolo and Secrid team up for a new trackable wallet
item.description: Chipolo has built a name for itself as the independent tracking company which happily integrates its products with both Apple and Google’s item-finding networks. Today, it’s announcing a partnership with wallet maker Secrid that, if you haven’t guessed already, sees the pair launch a compatible miniwallet. The Chipolo x Secrid Miniwallet Trackable is tailor-made to suit Chipolo’s Card tracker and accentuate all of its positives. For instance, the tracker sits on the back of the wallet, with the Find button accessible from the outside to make it easier to find your phone. If you misplace your d...

item.title: With US spy laws set to expire, lawmakers are split over protecting Americans from warrantless surveillance
item.description: Some lawmakers are calling for widespread reforms following years of surveillance scandals and abuses across successive U.S. administrations. But even if the spy law known as Section 702 expires on April 30, the government's spy powers will not automatically lapse.

item.title: What’s the key to better vegan cheese? Microbreweries, one startup says
item.description: AuX Labs says it has found a better way to make vegan cheese that tastes and feels like the real thing — and costs the same.

item.title: Cash App is targeting a new kind of customer: 6-12 year olds
item.description: Tech companies are constantly on the hunt for new customers, and Cash App, the fintech company owned by Jack Dorsey’s Block, believes it has found a promising new demographic: children. The company, which already offers financial services to teens, said this week that it is expanding its youth-focused services in an effort to build a […]

item.title: GRAI believes AI can make music more social, not replace artists
item.description: AI music startup GRAI says fans want to remix tracks, not generate songs from scratch.

item.title: What is the release date for Stranger Things: Tales From 85 on Netflix?
item.description: Stranger Things' second spin-off will launch on Netflix later this week — here's when you can watch it.

item.title: Half Man review: Richard Gadd's HBO Max debut is the most uncomfortable TV series I've ever seen — but it's still not a patch on Baby Reindeer
item.description: Richard Gadd arrives on HBO Max with Half Man, a twisted tale of two brothers intertwined for all the wrong reasons. But is it on par with Baby Reindeer?

item.title: This clever new carry-on is designed to open like a trunk
item.description: Australian luggage brand July’s Capsule carry-on ditches the clamshell for a top-down design—an innovation the company hopes will keep it alive while competitors fold. Picture this: You’re at the gate, shoes pinching after a long walk through the terminal, and you know you packed your flats. They’re right there, somewhere in your carry-on. But getting to them means hoisting the bag onto a bench, unzipping the clamshell, and watching your carefully packed clothes threaten to spill out onto the airport floor. By the time you’ve wrestled the bag back together, your flight is boarding....

item.title: Amazon Pet Days returns in May: Everything you need to know about Prime Day for pets
item.description: Amazon Pet Days returns from May 11 to 15 in 2026, the company announced Tuesday. Here's what you need to know about the sale ahead of time.

item.title: Half Man review: Is Richard Gadds new series as good as Baby Reindeer?
item.description: Richard Gadd's new limited series, "Half Man", is on its way to HBO. TV review.

item.title: Explaining AMD gear modes and why they’re important for intensive workloads
item.description: How AMD Gear 1 and Gear 2 balance memory speed, latency, and bandwidth for different workloads.
